info.name: 🛻 Pickup Driver App
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Pickup (small truck / multi-stop) Driver mobile app.

**Role required:** `driver pickup`

**E2E Flow:**
1. Login → capture token
2. Check Today Log → decide whether to show Start Shift screen
3. POST Start Shift (once per day)
4. GET Dashboard → note your {{assignmentId}}
5. Update Transit Status through all 6 steps
6. POST Submit Transport Report at ARRIVED_AT_DESTINATION
7. PATCH End Shift (once per day)

**Key difference from Eicher:**
- Instead of a single flat `startRoute/midRoute/destination`, the Pickup driver submits a `routes[]` **array** of stops.
- Files: `uploadSlipPhoto` + `meterPhoto` (no weightSlipPhoto / dieselSlipPhoto).

**Status Flow (transitStatus):**
`DISPATCHED` → `EN_ROUTE_TO_FARM` → `ARRIVED_AT_FARM` → `LOADING` → `IN_TRANSIT_TO_DESTINATION` → `ARRIVED_AT_DESTINATION`

request.description:
Login as Pickup Driver. The test script auto-saves the JWT to `{{token}}`.

**Response fields of interest:**
- `token` — JWT bearer token
- `user.role` — should be `driver pickup`
- `user.vehicleId` — the pre-assigned pickup vehicle
Returns full driver profile including populated vehicleId. Use this to display the driver's vehicle details and pre-fill the Start Shift form.

formdata.description: Current odometer reading (km)
Pickup vehicle registration number
Amount of petrol advance taken (₹). Send 0 if none.
📷 Required — Photo of odometer at start of shift
📷 Optional — Photo of petrol receipt if advance taken

request.description:
Starts the daily shift log. Each driver can only have ONE active log per day.

**Constraint:** Returns `400` if a log already exists for today — always call `check-today` first.

**Response:** The created DailyLog document.

Returns:
- `kpis` — counts of active / completed / cancelled assignments scoped to **this pickup driver**
- `activeAssignments[]` — Logistics records where `pickupDriverId` = this user AND `assignmentStatus` is `PENDING` or `IN_PROGRESS`

👉 Save `activeAssignments[0]._id` into `{{assignmentId}}` to proceed.
Alternative to Dashboard — returns a flat array of active assignment documents (PENDING + IN_PROGRESS).

item.name: 3. Transit Status Updates
item.description:
Update the live position of the pickup truck in 5 steps.

⚡ **Auto-promotion:** The first call away from `DISPATCHED` automatically changes `assignmentStatus` from `PENDING` → `IN_PROGRESS`.

request.description:
Pickup driver has left and is heading to the first farm stop.

🔄 `assignmentStatus` auto-promoted: `PENDING` → `IN_PROGRESS`
🔄 `transitStatus`: `DISPATCHED` → `EN_ROUTE_TO_FARM`

Pickup truck has arrived at the farm pickup location.

🔄 `transitStatus`: `EN_ROUTE_TO_FARM` → `ARRIVED_AT_FARM`

Crates / boxes are being loaded onto the pickup truck.

🔄 `transitStatus`: `ARRIVED_AT_FARM` → `LOADING`

All stops done, truck is now en route to the weighbridge / handoff destination.

🔄 `transitStatus`: `LOADING` → `IN_TRANSIT_TO_DESTINATION`

Pickup truck has arrived at the handoff destination. Now submit the Transport Report (Step 4).

🔄 `transitStatus`: `IN_TRANSIT_TO_DESTINATION` → `ARRIVED_AT_DESTINATION`

formdata.value: [{"startPoint": "Base Depot", "midPoint": "", "destination": "Farm A", "task": "Collect 50 boxes", "teamName": ""}, {"startPoint": "Farm A", "midPoint": "", "destination": "Weighbridge", "task": "Weigh & hand off to Eicher", "teamName": ""}]
formdata.description:
JSON string — array of route stops. Each stop: { startPoint, midPoint?, destination, task?, teamName? }

⚠️ Schema requires `startPoint` and `destination` in each stop.
Total kilometers driven across all stops
Total toll paid (₹)
true if truck halted overnight
true if route was cancelled
Optional — crew member names
JSON string — boxes collected per farmer at each stop
📷 Required — Upload slip / loading confirmation photo
📷 Required — Weighbridge meter / odometer photo
📷 Recommended — Odometer photo at end of route

request.description:
Submit the final transport report for this assignment.

**Constraints:**
- Only one Trip per `assignmentId` per driver. Duplicate returns `400`.
- `driverType` is **auto-detected** from JWT role: `driver pickup` → `Pickup`.
- Uses `routes[]` array (NOT flat startRoute/midRoute/destination fields).
- Files are different from Eicher: `uploadSlipPhoto` + `meterPhoto` (no weightSlip, dieselSlip, unloadSlip).

**After submission:** OM reviews the trip. Final Enquiry closure requires OM Packing approval.

formdata.value: [{"startPoint": "Base Depot", "midPoint": "", "destination": "Farm A", "task": "Collect 55 boxes (corrected)", "teamName": ""}, {"startPoint": "Farm A", "midPoint": "", "destination": "Weighbridge", "task": "Weigh & hand off", "teamName": ""}]
formdata.description: Corrected routes array as JSON string
Corrected total km
📷 Re-upload corrected upload slip
📷 Re-upload corrected meter photo

request.description:
Update a previously submitted transport report. Works when `reviewStatus` is `PENDING` or `REJECTED`.

Use `:tripId` (the `_id` from the POST Submit response).

**Behaviour:** If `reviewStatus` was `REJECTED`, it is automatically reset to `PENDING` so the OM can review the corrected report.

Only supply the fields you want to change — other fields remain unchanged.
Returns all completed transport reports for this pickup driver, paginated and sorted newest first.

Returns a monthly summary for this pickup driver:
- `summary.totalTrips`
- `summary.totalKm`
- `summary.totalToll`
- `summary.totalFuelAdvance`
- `summary.totalHaults`
- `summary.totalLineCancels`
- `dailyTripLog[]` — trips grouped by date
Returns fuel/diesel advances issued to this pickup driver by the OM.

formdata.description: Odometer reading at end of shift
📷 Required — Photo of odometer at end of shift

request.description:
Closes the active Day Log for today. Call this at the end of the pickup driver's workday.

**Constraint:** Returns `404` if no active log exists for today.
